response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with broad polyglot experience, but the role demands 8 years of C++ and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems and cloud compute platform work. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months, 2014-2015) and no demonstrated experience leading cloud compute platform architecture or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at scale. Core stack mismatch outweighs the solid leadership and mentoring signals.
strengths: Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course
Long track record of shipping production systems across diverse stacks
Founder-level ownership of an open-source platform deployable on Kubernetes
concerns: Far short of the 8-year C++ requirement — only ~6 months at NI
No clear large-scale distributed systems or cloud compute platform leadership experience
Primary expertise is web/full-stack (TS, Node, D), not infrastructure/compute platforms

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed systems leadership
Mentoring and technical leadership track record
